title: RCE via SQL mode of Merge node (AlaSQL file-access functions not disabled)
description: The Merge node's "Combine by SQL" mode executes a user-supplied SQL query through the AlaSQL engine. In the combineBySql execute() handler the resolved query string is passed directly to db.exec() without disabling AlaSQL's file-system / loader functions (FILE, LOAD, CSV, JSON, etc.). An authenticated user with workflow create/modify permission can therefore craft SQL that reads arbitrary local files on the n8n host and, by abusing AlaSQL's loader/engine handlers, achieve remote code execution. This is code injection (CWE-94) executed through the embedded SQL interpreter.
